items.title: NorthWestern Energy & Black Hills to merge, Caterpillar upgrade
items.description: Here are some of the stories Wall Street is watching on Tuesday, Aug. 19. NorthWestern Energy (NWE) and Black Hills (BKH) have agreed to merge, with the companies having a combined enterprise value of $15.4 billion. Shares of Fabrinet (FN) are sliding despite posting Q4 results that topped estimates. Caterpillar (CAT) shares were upgraded to Outperform from In Line at Evercore ISI. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

items.title: Caterpillar Stock Rises. Wall Street Is Getting More Enthusiastic About Recovery.
